# Amba Plastolite

> Amba Plastolite is a leading manufacturer of premium chemical-resistant High-Density Polyethylene (HDPE) bottles, agro jars, and PET containers in Indore, India. Specializing in high-durability packaging for Agro-chemical, Pesticide, Pharmaceutical, and Cosmetic industries since 2011.

## Main Pages
- [Home Page](https://ambaplastolite.com): Overview of manufacturing experience (15+ years), virgin HDPE commitment, 24/7 production cycle, client testimonials, and key advantages.
- [Product Catalog](https://ambaplastolite.com/products): Complete range of HDPE bottles, agro jars, boxes, and PET containers. Includes filterable catalog by category and target industry.
- [About Us](https://ambaplastolite.com/about): Company history, mission, quality control processes, and team profiles of directors Sandeep Patidar and Sanjay Patidar.
- [Contact Info](https://ambaplastolite.com/contact): Corporate Office address in Anand Nagar, Indore, manufacturing unit in Palda, telephone (+91 98260 68066), email (ambaplasto@gmail.com), and location details.

## Full Dataset
- [llms-full.txt](https://ambaplastolite.com/llms-full.txt): Complete textual representation of all website sections and details of all 45+ products for deep context ingestion.

## Key Capabilities & Specifications
- **Materials:** 100% Virgin HDPE (High-Density Polyethylene) and PET (Polyethylene Terephthalate).
- **Specializations:** Agro-chemical & Pesticide packaging, co-extrusion barrier bottles, fluorinated HDPE bottles, UV light protection (black HDPE), and custom mold design.
- **Capacity Range:** Bottles and jars ranging from 100ml to 1L+, custom weights, and custom color variations.
- **Service Area:** Supplier to leading pesticide and chemical manufacturers across India.
